question: A baker made 24 muffins in the morning and 18 more in the afternoon. She sold 30 of them during the day. How many muffins does she have left?
A classroom has 6 rows of desks with 5 desks in each row. If 7 desks are empty, how many desks are occupied?
Liam bought 3 packs of pencils. Each pack has 12 pencils. He gave 8 pencils to his friend. How many pencils does Liam have now?
A water tank holds 200 liters. It loses 15 liters each day. How many liters remain after 4 days?
Maria earns $9 per hour. She worked 6 hours on Monday and 4 hours on Tuesday. How much did she earn in total?
A library had 500 books. It received a donation of 120 books and then lent out 75 books. How many books are in the library now?
A farmer has 8 baskets with 15 apples each. He packs the apples into boxes of 20. How many full boxes can he make?
Noah ran 3 kilometers on each of 5 days. His goal was 20 kilometers for the week. How many more kilometers does he need to reach his goal?
John had 40 stickers. He gave 12 to Mary and bought 7 more. How many stickers does John have now?
A movie theater sold 45 tickets at $8 each. How much money did it collect?
